name: web-app/ts-node-service
description: TypeScript on Node 22, node:http service (no framework). API / back-end surface.
_note: Catalog is the fixed 7 (ADR-0005). This back-end profile binds the roles it needs; MiniMax M3 (multimodal) stays in the catalog but unbound — no UI work here. dispatch.sh reads roles.implementer + roles.verifier and enforces P8.
